conflicts.description: Different chapters place Tomas's fatal motel event at different locations (Hamilton Ave/Bayline, off Atlantic, off-highway Queens) while document-driven chapters provide a specific certified location.
conflicts.canonical_value: Harbor Motor Lodge, room 214 (Brooklyn jurisdiction) per certified municipal record trail.
conflicts.resolution_note: Selected documentary value because it is repeated across records-driven chapters and tied to certified retrieval workflow; alternate locations are single-speaker memory/confession variants.

conflicts.description: The family apartment unit is referenced as 2B in confrontation chapters but later as 3B.
conflicts.resolution_note: 2B is embedded in the chapter_12 document-confrontation setup and chapter_11 foreshadow; 3B is treated as a later line-level inconsistency.

conflicts.description: Most document-linked passages state acute combined fentanyl and heroin toxicity, but a chapter_18 reading excerpt states acute heroin and ethanol intoxication.
conflicts.canonical_value: Manner: accident; immediate cause: acute combined fentanyl and heroin toxicity.
conflicts.resolution_note: Retained the repeatedly cited certified-language version used in records retrieval and manuscript drafting; chapter_18 wording is treated as a recital-level deviation.
